who: billing coordinators at medical clinics processing 50–100 invoices/month
offer: For billing coordinators at medical clinics processing 50–100 invoices/month, frequent billing exceptions cause cash flow gaps. We automate daily exception reporting instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Frequent billing exceptions lead to delayed payments and cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing coordinators seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on related workflows
DM outreach to billing coordinators with a demo video
Participate in community forums for billing coordinators sharing tools
try_it: Let users manually enter exceptions and generate reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
